name: Create Storage Volumes for LXC
description: Creates Proxmox storage volumes (mpX) and attaches them to the container. Volumes are named by hostname and can be shared across CTs.

parameters.name: ID of the LXC Container
parameters.description: Optional. If set, volumes are attached to the container.

parameters.name: Hostname
parameters.description: Optional. Used for per-host volume subdirectories.

parameters.name: Addon Volumes
parameters.description: Additional volumes from addons (merged with base volumes).

parameters.name: Volume Storage
parameters.description: Proxmox storage ID for data volumes. Auto-detected from rootfs if not set.

parameters.name: Include in Backup
parameters.description: Whether the volume should be included in Proxmox backups

parameters.name: Mapped UID (Host)
parameters.description: UID mapping on the host for unprivileged containers

parameters.name: Mapped GID (Host)
parameters.description: GID mapping on the host for unprivileged containers

parameters.name: Previous VM ID
parameters.description: Previous container VMID (upgrade/reconfigure). Used to prefer reusing that CT's existing volumes over any other historical match.
